summary: Tested dashboard redirect by role and BecomeInfluencerPage button (Iteration 38). All features working correctly: getDashboardUrl(role) in Header.js correctly maps each role to its dashboard, BecomeInfluencerPage shows 'Registrarme como Influencer' button instead of form.

issues: Console warning: nested <a> tags in ProductCard component - store link inside product card link causes hydration warning
Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - charts still render correctly but warning appears in console

passed_tests: BecomeInfluencerPage: CTA section with 'Registrarme como Influencer' button visible
BecomeInfluencerPage: No form elements in CTA section (button only)
BecomeInfluencerPage: Button click navigates to registration page with role=influencer
Super Admin dashboard loads with data (Manage Admins panel)
Admin dashboard loads with data (Panel de Administración)
Producer dashboard loads with data (Health Score, Products, Orders)
Influencer dashboard loads with data (Total Sales, Discount Code, Commissions)
Customer dashboard loads with data (Orders, Profile)
critical_code_review_comments: getDashboardUrl(role) function in Header.js correctly implements role-to-dashboard mapping
BecomeInfluencerPage.js correctly shows CTA section with button instead of form
All dashboards load correctly with data - no blank panels
Minor: ProductCard has nested <a> tags causing React hydration warning - not blocking but should be fixed
seed_data_creation: Updated admin password hash to match password123 for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38 verified: 1) getDashboardUrl(role) in Header.js correctly maps roles: super_admin→/super-admin, admin→/admin, producer→/producer, influencer→/influencer/dashboard, customer→/dashboard. 2) BecomeInfluencerPage shows CTA section with 'Registrarme como Influencer' button linking to /register?role=influencer (no form). 3) All dashboards load correctly with data. 4) Minor issue: ProductCard has nested <a> tags causing React hydration warning.

dashboard_redirect_super_admin.details: super_admin role redirects to /super-admin, dashboard loads with Manage Admins panel

dashboard_redirect_admin.details: admin role redirects to /admin, dashboard loads with Panel de Administración

dashboard_redirect_producer.details: producer role redirects to /producer, dashboard loads with Health Score and products

dashboard_redirect_influencer.details: influencer role redirects to /influencer/dashboard, dashboard loads with sales and commissions

dashboard_redirect_customer.details: customer role redirects to /dashboard, dashboard loads with orders and profile

become_influencer_button.details: BecomeInfluencerPage shows 'Registrarme como Influencer' button instead of form, links to /register?role=influencer

influencer_panel_not_blank.details: Influencer dashboard loads correctly with Total Sales €500.00, discount code TESTITER34, commission summary
